title: MIZORAM LARSAP-IN INDIAN INSTITUTE OF PUBLIC ADMINISTRATION-A APPPA COURSE TRANING-TE HMAAH THU A SAWI
content:
243/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 22nd April, 2026:Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan nimin khan Indian Institute of Public Administration, New Delhi tlawhin, Advanced Professional Programme in Public Administration (APPPA) course training mek officer-te hmaah thu a sawi.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan ram venhim kawngah awmze nei taka tanrual a pawimawh thu sawiin, ram himna tichhe theite sawrkar anga hmachhawn turin a mal maia kal lova, ngaihtuahna thar leh thawh hona tha zawk hmanga hmachhawn a tul thu a sawi a. Ram tan anih dawn phawt chuan Sawrkar laipui hnuaia ministry atanga district administration thlengin lungrual leh inpawh tlang taka hmalak a ngaih thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan PM Gati Shakti pawimawh zia tarlangin, Ministry hrang hrang, State leh local body-te inkara thawh hona felfai tak avangin  hmasawnna ruhrel ataka hmuh theiha a awm thu sawiin, hei hian Sawrkar policy leh hmanraw neihte tha taka kalkawp tirin rah chhuah duhawm tak bakah, tul lova sum leh pai deh ral mai mai tur a ven thu a sawi a. Ram hmasawn nan hmalakna huapzo, kan zavaia telna leh tanhona kalpui a pawimawh a ti a. Ram ralmuang leh zalen siam turin inrintawnna, mawhphurhna intawm leh tan hona neih a tul thu a sawi bawk.

title: MIZORAM GOVERNOR GRACES YOUTH FESTIVAL (UNIVOYAGE) 2026 IN AIZAWL
content:
32/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 22nd April, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) graced the Youth Festival (Univoyage) 2026, jointly organised by ICFAI University Mizoram and the Tourism Department, at the ICFAI University campus in Durtlang North, Aizawl, today.

Addressing the gathering, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh expressed appreciation for the initiative, describing the festival as a valuable platform for motivating young people and providing meaningful learning opportunities. He stressed that such events would bring significant benefits to students and help shape their future. Highlighting the importance of youth as the future of the nation, he underscored the need to invest in their development. He also underlined the importance of skills development and upskilling for job creation and employability, remarking that maximum learning often takes place through direct interaction with people, making such festivals highly impactful.

Speaking on the potential of Mizoram’s tourism sector, the Governor noted that the state already possesses key advantages such as a pleasant climate, scenic landscapes and a clean environment. He stated that with improved facilities and a more favorable environment for visitors, Mizoram could attract a larger number of tourists. He also emphasised the importance of promoting eco-friendly tourism and maintaining harmony with nature. Encouraging the youth to actively participate and learn with enthusiasm, he expressed hope that the Youth Festival would yield positive and meaningful outcomes for both Mizoram and its people.

The programme was chaired by Prof. (Dr.) Ginlianlal Buhril, Vice-Chancellor of ICFAI University Mizoram, who delivered the welcome address. Speeches were also delivered by Pi Irene Zohlimpuli Chongthu, Additional Secretary, Tourism Department, Government of Mizoram; Padma Shri Patricia Mukhim, Editor of The Shillong Times and Dr. Theyiesinuo Keditsu from Kohima, Nagaland. The event featured a panel discussion and an interactive session. The programme concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Dr. David Lawmzuala, Registrar of ICFAI University Mizoram.

The Youth Festival (Univoyage) 2026 is a two-day event (April 22-23), held under the theme “Exploring Diversity, Strengthening Bonds.”

.

title: MIZORAM LARSAP-IN YOUTH FESTIVAL 2026 A HMANPUI
content:
242/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 22nd April, 2026:Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chuan vawiin khan ICFAI University Mizoram leh Tourism Department tangkawp buatsaih, Youth Festival (Univoyage) 2026 chu ICFAI University Mizoram Campus, Durtlang North, Aizawlah a hmanpui.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan thalaite tih phur nana topic pawimawh tak tak zirna hun, Youth Festival 2026 buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, an hlawkpui ngei a beisei thu a sawi a. Thalaite chu kan ram nghahfak an nih thu leh ngaihven an tul thu sawiin, hna zawn leh siam nana pawimawh tak, thiamna inzirtirna leh peipunna lam hawi zirtirna ngaih pawimawh a tul thu a sawi a. Mipui nawlpui kawm tama ngaihven peih chu inzirna tha tak anih thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan tourism sector tihchangtlun nana pawimawhte tarlangin, khualzin hip tam deuh deuh turin hmanraw tihchangtlun leh boruak duhawm zawk siam bak Mizoramin mamawh dang a neih loh thu sawiin, sik leh sa nuam, hmun mawi leh boruak thianghlim nei anihna chu tourism tihhmasawn nana tha tak a ni, a ti a. Leilung leh a chhunga cheng nena inrem thlap khualhip dan kalpui thiam a tul thu a sawi bawk a. Thalaite chu nuam ti tak chunga thiam thil zir tura chahin, Youth Festival chuan Mizoram leh a chhunga chengte tan rah duhawm tak a thlen ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Prof. (Dr.) Ginlianlal Buhril, Vice-Chancellor, ICFAI University Mizoram chuan vawiin hun hman hi kaihruaiin inlawmna thu a sawi a. Pi Irene Zohlimpuli Chongthu, Addl. Secretary, Tourism Department, Govt. of Mizoram; Padma Shri Patricia Mukhim, Editor, Shillong Times leh Dr. Theyiesinuo Keditsu, Kohima, Nagaland te hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni a. Sawi hona leh zawhna leh chhanna hu  hman a ni a. Dr. David Lawmzuala Registrar, ICFAI University Mizoram chuan lawmthu sawiin hun hman a khar a ni.

Youth Festival (Univoyage) 2026 hi ni hnih (22-23 April) awh niin, thupui atan "Exploring Diversity, Strengthening Bonds" tih chu hman a ni.

Attachment

title: NEC RECORDS LANDMARK PERFORMANCE IN FY 2025–26 WITH ₹1,496.78 CRORE EXPENDITURE
content:
31/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 22ndApril 2026:The North Eastern Council (NEC), the apex statutory body responsible for regional planning and development in India’s northeastern states, has reported a significant milestone in the financial year 2025–26, with total expenditure reaching ₹1,496.78 crore. This marks a notable acceleration in development efforts across the region.

According to official data, ₹792.12 crore was utilized under the Schemes of NEC (SoNEC), while ₹704.66 crore was spent under the North East Special Infrastructure Development Scheme – Roads (NESIDS-Roads), highlighting a strong push toward infrastructure and connectivity.

Highest Project Sanctions in Current Finance Cycle

During the year, NEC sanctioned 54 new projects worth ₹435.22 crore—the highest number approved in a single year during the ongoing 15th Finance Commission period. These projects span sectors such as higher education, healthcare, agriculture, tourism, industry, and cultural preservation.

Additionally, 162 non-project initiatives—including festivals, workshops, seminars, and awareness programmes—were approved with a total outlay of ₹24.06 crore. This brings the total value of new sanctions in FY 2025–26 to ₹459.28 crore.

Strong Delivery: 136 Projects Completed

The Council also recorded substantial progress in project execution. A total of 136 projects worth ₹678.85 crore were completed during the year, marking the second-highest annual completion rate in the current Finance Commission cycle.

Further, 161 non-project activities worth ₹17.28 crore were successfully concluded, taking the total number of completed deliverables to 297.

Major Gains in Road Infrastructure

Under the NESIDS-Roads scheme, the Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region sanctioned 64 road projects worth ₹3,037.39 crore across the eight northeastern states during the 15th Finance Commission period. Of these, 30 projects worth ₹1,123.08 crore have been completed so far.

In FY 2025–26 alone, expenditure under the scheme reached ₹704.66 crore, contributing to key infrastructure such as bridges and road upgrades aimed at improving regional connectivity.

Enhanced Monitoring and Accountability

To ensure effective implementation, the NEC Secretariat conducted 405 field inspections of ongoing projects during the year. This extensive monitoring effort is aimed at maintaining quality, ensuring timely completion, and enhancing accountability.

Financial Discipline Sees Significant Improvement

A major governance achievement for NEC has been the sharp reduction in committed financial liabilities and pending utilisation certificates (UCs). Committed liabilities declined from ₹1,743.48 crore in April 2022 to ₹813.17 crore by March 2026—a reduction of over 53%.

Meanwhile, pending UCs dropped dramatically from ₹440.82 crore in April 2025 to just ₹10.94 crore by early 2026, reflecting a 97% reduction within a single financial year.

Leadership and Vision for the Future

The NEC Secretary expressed gratitude to state governments and implementing agencies for their continued cooperation in advancing developmental priorities in the Northeast.

Guided by the leadership of the NEC Chairperson, the Union Home Minister, and the Vice Chairperson, the Minister for Development of North Eastern Region, the Council reaffirmed its commitment to fostering inclusive growth.

Looking ahead, NEC aims to work closely with all northeastern states to achieve the vision of a “Viksit North East” by 2047, aligning with the broader national goal of a “Viksit Bharat.”

title: KOLASIB DC IN VAIRENGTE LEH A CHHEHVELA SAWRKAR HMUN PAWIMAWH TE TLAWHIN RAMRI DINHMUN  A ENFIAH
content:
241/2026-2027

Kolasib, 22nd April, 2026:Vawiin chawhma atang khan Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Vairengte leh a chhehvela sawrkar hmun pawimawh hrang hrang leh ramri (border) dinhmunte a tlawh kual.

DC hian National Highway 4-lane laih mek chu Vairengte thlengin a hmunah a enfiah a . NHIDCL hotuten lo tawiawmin, hnathawh mek dan kalphung leh hmasawn dan te  lo hrilhfiah in, an mamawh leh hna chak zawka an kalpui theihna tur te DC hnenah hian an thlen nghal a ni . DC chuan ram leh mipuite tana ram ro tling tur hmasawnna ruhrel thawk an nih angin mipuite hmakhua ngaihtuah chunga theihtawp chhuah zel turin a fuih a, hnathawktute pawhin a hma thei ang bera hna peihfel an tum thu leh theihtawp an chhuah thu an lo hrilh a ni. 4 lane siamna daltu hrang hrang arbitration leh court case te pawh a rang lama chinfel thuai a nih theih nan anmahni zawn theuh ah CALA Kolasib leh NHIDCL te chu ngaihtuahna seng thar turin a chah bawk.

Hemi hnu hian DC hian 3rd Battalion MAP tlawhin ramri venhimna (border security) chungchang leh an mamawhte a sawipui a. 1st Battalion IR, Vairengte tlawh chhunzawm lehin an camp mamawh leh thil pawimawh hrang hrangte an sawiho bawk. Assam leh Mizoram ramria 5th Battalion IR duty te awmna hmun, Sabual tlawh chhunzawm lehin, ramri a buaina leh harsatna an tawh thin te sawiho a ni a. DC chuan ramri vengtute inpekna a fak thu sawiin, huaisen leh taima taka hna thawk zawm zel turin a fuih nghal bawk.

DC hian Vairengte Community Health Centre (CHC) tlawh lehin, doctor leh nurse te nen  inkawmkhawmna hun an hmang a. Vairengte CHC-ah hian Medical Officer pakhat (1), AYUSH doctor pahnih (2), dental surgeon Pakhat leh thawktu (staff) thahnemtak an awm mek a. X-ray machine thar leh hmanraw tangkai tak tak he hospital ah hian a awm bawk a ni.

Heng bakah hian DC hian Bilkhawthlir a Eklavya model Residential School tlawh leh in, he hmunah hian zirlai pawl 6 atang a pawl kua mi zahnih chuang zet an awm a, DC in School naupangte leh zirtirtute fuihna thusawina a neih hnuin Bilkhawthlir a BDO Office hmunhma a tlawh zui nghal a ni.

Vawiina Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia'n sawrkar hmun pawimawh te a tlawhnaah hian Addl. DC Pi B. Malsawmtluangi, Addl. SP Pu K. Laltluangliana, Sr. CMO Dr. RK Lalthlamuana, Vairengte SDO Pu H. Lalbiakzauva, DIPRO Pu David A Lalhmingchhuana, SDC Pi Lalrinchhani leh NHIDCL aiawhten an tawiawm a ni.

title: HNAHTHIAL DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON GYAN BHARATAM MISSION CHU A VAWI KHATNA ATAN AN THUKHAWM
content:
240/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 22nd April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 03:00 khan DC Meeting Hall, Hnahthial-ah Hnahthial District Bawrhsap Pi K. Vanlalruati kaihruaiin District Level Committee on Gyan Bharatam Mission an thukhawm a. He hunah hian Hnahthial District chhunga Gyan Bharatam Mission chungchang inhrilhfiahna hun leh hemi hnuaia hmalak tur hrang hrang sawi ho a ni.

Art & Culture Department-a Chemist, Pu C. Lalmuanpuia chuan Gyan Bharatam Mission chungchang sawifiahin Gyan Bharatam Mission chu Ministry of Culture hnuaia Central Scheme niin India ram puma kutziak hlu bik (Manuscript) zawnchhuah hna beihpui thlakna a nih thu a sawi a. Heng kutziakte hi pi leh pute kut hnu hlu tak tak a nih thu leh tunlai thiamna hmanga heng an sulhnute vawnhim beihpui thlak a nih tur thu kum 2025 Independence Day thuchahah Prime Minister pawhin a lo puan tawh thu a sawi bawk.

April 1, 2026 khan he Gyan Bharatam Mission atan hian Mizoramah State Level Committee leh District Level Committee lo din tawh niin chak zawk leh awmze nei zawka hmalak dan turte chu State Level Committee ṭhukhawm hian an lo rel tawh a ni.

Pi leh pute sulhnu, an kutziak (Manuscript) hrang hrangte hi an riral mai loh a, vawnthat an nih theihna tura hmalakna kawng hmasa ber chu a zawnchhuah hna thawh niin khawi hmunah nge, tu hnenah nge, Manuscript engzat nge an kawl tihte chu Gyan Bharatam Mobile Application hmangin mitinin an report thei a. Heng Manuscript-te hi inchhuhsak tur a nih lo va, a neitute remtihna thlapin uluk taka thla lak a, a Soft Copy chauh vawnhim tura lak tur niin a tak (Original) erawh a neitute kutah a awm zui ang.

He hunah hian Pu HD. Lalpekmawia, Project Director, DRDO; Govt. Hnahthial College-a Mizo Professor te, Hnahthial District VC Association President, Pu Lallawmzuala, Chairman Cultural Sub Committee, Sub Hqrs. YMA Hnahthial leh Pu C. Zonunmawia te chu an tel a ni.

title: MLA PU JEJE LALPEKHLUA’N TUICHANGRAL GAMES 2026 KHARNA HUN HMANPUI
content:
239/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 22nd April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Tuichangral Games 2026  kharna hun Khawhai Playground Field-a neih chu South Tuipui bialtu MLA Pu JJ Lalpekhlua chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a. He hun hi TGSA Gen. Secy Pu F. Saihmingliana’n a kaihruai.

Khuallian Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan thu sawiin, Tuichangral games a awm theihna tura hma la tute thawhrimna zahawm a tih thu a sawi a. East Lungdar football ground-a grass phah a ni tur leh volleyball court siama a chung zar a ni tur hian Tuichangral khua sawrkarin a ngaihpawimawhzia a lantir, a ti a. Tuichangral games hlutna chu he games atang hian thalai talent nei tha engzat nge haichhuah an nih a, inkhelmi engzat nge chherchhuah an nih tih sawiin, thangtharte chu he games hi chhawr tangkai turin a fuih a. Tunlai khawvelah sports hi eizawnna atan a hman tlak tawh a, amaherawhchu mi zawng zawng tan eizawnna atan hman theih a ni lo tih a sawi a. Hlawhtlinna chang tur chuan talent neih that ringawt a tawk lova, a thawkrim leh a taima apiang an thleng sang thin, a ti a. Nu leh pa kalkhawmte pawh an fate infiamna lama talent an nei a nih chuan eizawnna tlaka an hman theih nan mithiamte leh coach-te kaihhruaina hnuaih theihtawp chhuahpui turin a chah a. Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan sports hi damdawi mumlian a ni a, eizawnna atana hmang lote tan pawhin hriselna atan mai bakah midangte nen inpawhna tha siamtu a nih thu a sawi a, mitinte infiamna engemaw tal ti ve turin a chah bawk a. Zirna lamah emaw infiamna lamah pawh beidawn chang a awm thin a, chutiang hunah chuan beidawng mai lova thawkrim zual sauh zawk turin thalaite a chah a. Tournament chhungin red card hmu an awm lo chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin he games hi thalaite tan infiamna lama kailawn pawimawh tak a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi.

TGSA Sr. Vice President Pu Lalrengpuia Colney, Match Commissioner ni bawk hnen atangin technical report ngaihthlak a ni a. Tuicahngral Games and Sports huamchhungah hian khua 33 a awm mek a. Tuichangral Games 2026-a team awm zat a hnuaia tarlan ang hi a ni -

Football : Mipa team -15 leh hmeichhia team – 4

Volleyball : Mipa team - 11 leh hmeichhia team - 8

Heng bakah hian U-16 tan Weight lifting, Boxing leh Wrestling-ahte inelna buatsaih a ni bawk.

Group stage-ah Red Card phawrh a ni lova. Hetiang hi card hmuh dan a ni -

Yellow Card : Men – 31; Women - 3

Red Card : Men – 2 ; Women - Nil

FINAL RESULT

Volley ball

Women - Biate Vs Tualte ; Winner - Tualte

Men - Khawhai Vs Tualte ; Winner - Khawhai

Football

Women - N. Mualcheng Vs Sialhawk ; Winner - Sialhawk (1-0)

Men - Sialhawk Vs Tlangmawi ; Winner – Sialhawk (4 -2)

PRIZE

Volleyball

Men - Winner : Rs. 25,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Runnersup : Rs. 15,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Woman - Winner : Rs. 15,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Runnersup : Rs. 10,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Individual

Men & Women - Best Setter and Best Spiker (Medal+Certificate)

Football

Men - Winner : Rs. 40,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Runnersup : Rs. 25,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Women - Winner : Rs. 20,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Runnersup : Rs. 15,000/- + Trophy+Medal+Certificate

Individual

Men & Women  - Best player and Top scorer (Medal+Certificate)

Fair play : Rs. 2,000/-

Semi Finalist : Rs. 2,000/- (each)

title: SAITUAL DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON GYAN BHARATAM MISSION THUKHAWM
content:
238/2026-2027

Saitual, the 22nd April, 2026:Vawiin khan Saitual District Level Committee on Gyan Bharatam Mission chu District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi kaihhruaiin an thu khawm a, Gyan Bharatam Mission kal tlanga District level-a hmanlai kutziak (manuscript) humhalh nana hmalak dan tur te sawiho a ni.

He hunah hian Pu Lalthanmawia, Jt. Director, Art & Culture department chuan Gyan Bharatam Mission thil tum te chu a sawi zau a, India ram chhunga hmanlai kutziak (manuscript) humhalh nana hmalakna a ni tih sawiin, Mizoramah pawh District hrang hrangah te manuscript zawn chhuah a ngaih thu a sawi bawk.

Manuscript ni tur chuan kum 75-a upa, kutziak ngeia thuziak a ni tur a ni a, hnah thel, lehkhapuan siam chawp, puan, thing emaw thira ziah a ni tur a ni. Gyan Bharatam Mission-in a tum ber chu Manuscript te humhalh a, a neitute remtihnain tunlai thiamna hmanga vawn that (Digitize) hi a ni a, a tak (original) erawh a neitute kutah a awm zui zel ang.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian khawtlang hruaitute leh kohhrana hotute hnenah lehkha pek ni se tih rel a ni a, an ni hian an theih ang angin Manuscript zawn chhuah kawngah hma an lo la dawn a ni. Report awm te chu Pu Laldingliana, DEO, GBM Nodal Officer ni bawk hnenah thehluh tur a ni a, report hi khawn khawm a nih hunah DC hnenah thehluh leh tur niin, State level-a thawn thlak leh a ni ang. Manuscript zawng chhuak tute chuan Gyan Bharatam Mobile Application hmang pawhin an thehlut thei a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi-in a kai hruai a, Pu Lalthanmawia, Jt. Director, Art & Culture department leh District Level Committee on Gyan Bharatam Mission member te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SAITUAL DISTRICT BORDER COORDINATION COMMITTEE THUKHAWM
content:
237/2026-2027

Saitual, the 22nd April, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah Pu Srinivas Sadi, District Bawrhsap kaihhruaiin, Saitual District-a Indo-Myanmar Border hungna leh entry/exit point panna tur kawng siam chungchangah Saitual District Border Coordination Committee an thu khawm.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Saitual District Indo-Myanmar Border hungna leh entry/exit point panna tur kawng (approach road) Hrianghmun khuaa siamna tur hmun chu endik ni se tih rel a ni a, a endik hunah hian Border Roads Organisation aiawh, Assam rifles aiawh leh Hrianghmun khuaa VC leh YMA hruaitute tel se tih rel a ni. Endikna report hi BRO chuan ziakin DC hnenah a thehlut ang.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi District Bawrhsap Pu Srinivas Sadi chuan a kai hruai a, Pu Tharun Patnaik, SDO (S) bakah District Border Coordination Committee member te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MAMIT-AH DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON GYAN BHARATAM MISSION THUKHAWM
content:
235/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 22nd of April,2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall,Mamit-ah Mamit District level Committee on Gyan Bharatam Mission chu Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte, Addl DC hoin an thukhawm. Gyan Bharatam Mission hi Ministry of Culture hnuaia hmalakna niin India ram huapa kut ziak (manuscript) hluite zawn chhuah leh vawnthat (digitalized) tumna a ni.

Vawiin hunah hian Pu Paul Lalringzuala, Superintendent of Archives, Art & Culture dept chuan he mission in a tum tlangpui sawizauna a nei a, mipuite nena thawhho that a pawimawh thu sawiin mi tin,pawl emaw mimalin Gyan Bharatam mobile application kaltlangin thu ziak hlui report tur neite chuan hemi app kaltlang hian an thehlut thei dawn a ni a ti. Mizo te chuan thuziak kan lo uar lo thin a, kan thil hlui ziaka neih kan ngaih pawimawhna atan he hmalakna hi a that bakah state dangte pawhin an en theih tur archive neih hi hnam hmasawn zelna atan a tha a ni a ti.

Committee chuan he mission atan SDO(Sadar) chu district nodal officer/ coordinator atan ruatin a zau thei ang bera mipuite hnena he mission chungchang puang darh turin khawtlang hruaitute, NGO, zirna in te chu hmala tura ngen an ni.

Attachment

title: KVK KHAWZAWL-IN TUALTE KHUAA KUT HNATHAWKTUTE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
234/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 22nd April, 2026 : Vawiin khan KVK Khawzawl chuan Tualte khua-a kut hnathawktute hnenah training an pe.

He hun hi Pi R. Vanlalduati, Subject Matter Specialist (Soil Science) chuan kaihruaiin, leilung sawngbawl dan chi hrang hrang zirtina a neih bakah, Central Ministry lamin tunlaia an ngaihpawimawh em em ‘Leitha inbuk tawk lo pekin a nghawng tha lo kan leilunga thleng thei te’ (Balanced Use of Fertilizers) tih thupui hmangin Awareness campaign a neia, leitha pek tam luatin thlai leh leia a nghawng tha lo te, lei tha inbuk tawk pek a pawimawhzia leh biofertilizers hman tul tawh zia leh thlai tana an tangkaina hrang hrang he hunah hian kuthnathawktu kalkhawmte hrilh hriatna a nei nghal bawk.

He hunah hian Tualte khua-a Tomato chinga hmalatu chhungkaw 100-te hnenah  Indian Institute of Horticultural Research (IIHR-NEH) Scheme hnuai atangin Tomato chi sem chhuah nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: TLABUNG-KHAWTHLANG TUIPUI AH SANGHA MAN RUNPUI BUATSAIH DAWN
content:
233/2026-2027

April ni 22, 2026:Fisheries Department leh Tlabung Branch YMA te leh No-Fishing Zone Sub-Committee tangkaw chuan vawiin khan April ni 28-30, 2026 chhunga Khawthlang Tuipui, Tlabung a Community Fish Harvesting Event (Sangha Man Runpui) buatsaih chungchang an sawi ho.

Pi Zonunthari, Joint Secretary, Fisheries Department hovin he meeting hi neih a ni a. Ruahmanna siam danin he Sangha man runpui ah hian a ni khatna chu nghakuai a man tur a duan niin, a ni hnihna ah len hmangin an man thung dawn a ni. He event atan hian registration hawn tawh niin, nghakuai pakhat zelah Rs.100 a in register theih a ni a, nghakuai hi pakhat aia tam chiah phal a ni dawn a ni. Len hmanga man erawh chu mipui nawlpui ni lovin a thiam bik ten an ti ang. A ni thumna chu tualchhung mite tan bika hun hman a ni ang. Nghakuai chiah bikah hian a man lian ber, man hnem ber, best woman angler, man zinga naupang ber leh upa ber lawman te siam a ni ang.

Fisheries Act hnuaiah sangha humhalhte hi kum 3 dan zelah harvesting-man runpui ang hi phal a ni a. Tlabungah hian kum 2022 khan hetiang ang program hi lo siam tawh a ni a, tun tumah hian Mizoram puma open event angin siam a ni chho ta a ni. Lena mante hi kg 2 hnuailam chu chhuah leh vek tur a ni ang. He hunah hian a hmunah sangha hi  man tlawma zawrh nghal tura ruahman a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: GYAN BHARATAM MISSION CHUNGCHANGAH DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE THUTKHAWM HMASABER NEIH A NI
content:
232/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 22nd April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District Level Committee on Gyan Bharatam Mission chu, an Chairman District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin DC Meeting Hall-ah an thukhawm a, Ministry of Culture kaltlanga India ram pum huapa kut ziak (manuscript) hluite zawn chhuah leh vawn that (digitalized) kawnga hmalakna kalmek chungchang sawi ho niin, Serchhip District-a hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Pu C. Lalmuanpuia, Art & Culture Department, Aizawl atanga lokal chuan Gyan Bharatam Mission thil tum sawiin, pi leh pute sulhnu, an kutziak (khawlchhut ni lo) hrang hrangte an riral mai loh a, vawn that tlat an nih theihna tura hmalakna a nih thu a sawi a, tunah hian ‘zawn chhuah (identification)’ hna thawh mek a nih thu leh awlsam zawka he hna thawhna tur atan hian ‘Gyan Bharatam Mobile Application’ siam a nih thu sawiin, mi tu pawh, mimal leh pawl emaw, thu ziak hlui report tur neite chuan he Mobile Application kaltlang hian an theh luh theih vek thu a sawi a. Mipuite’n he Application hi kan hmelhriattlan deuh deuh a pawimawh thu sawiin heng Manuscript-te hi a neitute remtihna thlapin uluk taka thla lak a, a Soft Copy chauh vawnhim tura lak tur niin, a tak (original) chu a neitute kutah a awm zui zel tur thu a sawi bawk.

Tun dinhmunah Mizoram chuan Mobile Application kaltlang hian survey request - 2, Manuscript - 28 nei mekin, N.E state-ah  Manuscript report la nei tlem ber kan nih thu a sawi a, report tam zawk nei tura tan lak a ngaih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Serchhip khaw chanchin hria leh thu leh hla lama mi ril, Pu Lalhmangaiha Chawngthu te, Govt. Serchhip College atangin Assistant Professor pahnih Pu K. Lalrinchhana leh Pu Laldinpuia te an tel bawk a. Hmalak dan tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a nih hnuin Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan mizote thu ziak hlui zawn chhuah hna thawk tur hian, Serchhip District-a khaw hrang hranga khawtlang hruaitute leh sawrkar hotute nen thawh hona tha neih a pawimawh tur thu leh chak taka hma lak zui a nih tur thu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Gyan Bharatam Mission hi kum 2025 – 2031 inkar chhunga kalpui tur a ni dawn a.  Mizoram-ah State Level Committee leh District Level Committee te chu April 1, 2026 khan din ni tawhin, Art & Culture Department chu State Nodal Department a ni a. Tunah hian district tinah Awareness Campaign hna thawkin an feh chhuak mek a ni.
